# SchedulerTimeIntervalConvertible

**Protocol**

A protocol that provides a scheduler with an expression for relative time.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol SchedulerTimeIntervalConvertible
```

## Converting seconds to scheduler time intervals

- **microseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of microseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **milliseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of milliseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **nanoseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of nanoseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **seconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of seconds, as a floating-point value, into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **seconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of seconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.

## Schedulers

- **Scheduler**: A protocol that defines when and how to execute a closure.
- **ImmediateScheduler**: A scheduler for performing synchronous actions.

## Conforming Types

- ImmediateScheduler.SchedulerTimeType.Stride
